description.value: Aura moderate conjuration; CL 10th; Weight â; Price +30,000 gp DESCRIPTION A shield or armor with the determination special ability provides the ability to fight on even in the face of seemingly impossible odds. Once per day, when the owner reaches 0 or fewer hit points, the item automatically provides a breath of life spell. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells breath of life; Cost +15,000 gp
